description: Fraudsters impersonate banks, payment providers or government agencies and trick victims into updating KYC details to steal credentials, OTPs or money.
recommended_actions: Do not share OTPs, PINs or banking credentials.
Verify KYC requests only through official bank channels.
Never install unknown APKs or remote access apps.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
Preserve messages, screenshots, call logs and transaction details.

rules.name: KYC Expired Alert
rules.explanation: Claims the user's KYC has expired to create urgency.
examples: Your KYC has expired. Update now to avoid account suspension.
Complete your KYC verification immediately.

rules.name: Bank KYC Verification
rules.explanation: Pretends to be a bank requesting KYC verification.
examples: Complete SBI KYC by sharing the OTP.
Your HDFC account requires immediate KYC verification.

rules.name: Aadhaar Verification
rules.explanation: Uses Aadhaar verification as a pretext for fraud.
examples: Verify your Aadhaar to continue banking.
Update Aadhaar KYC immediately.

rules.name: PAN Verification
rules.explanation: Requests PAN verification to steal information.
examples: Link your PAN to avoid account blockage.
Verify PAN details today.

rules.name: UPI KYC Update
rules.explanation: Impersonates UPI platforms requesting fake KYC.
examples: Complete PhonePe KYC to continue UPI services.
Your Google Pay KYC is pending.

rules.name: Wallet Suspension Threat
rules.explanation: Threatens suspension if KYC isn't completed.
examples: Your Paytm wallet will be blocked today.
Complete KYC or your wallet will be suspended.

rules.name: APK Installation Request
rules.explanation: Requests installation of remote access software during KYC.
examples: Install this app to complete KYC.
Download the attached APK for verification.

rules.name: Fake RBI/NPCI Notice
rules.explanation: Uses RBI or NPCI branding to appear legitimate.
examples: RBI requires mandatory KYC verification.
NPCI compliance pending. Update now.

rules.name: OTP for KYC
rules.explanation: Requests an OTP claiming it is required for KYC.
examples: Share the OTP to complete KYC.
Read the verification code for account activation.

rules.name: Immediate Account Suspension
rules.explanation: Uses fear of account suspension to pressure the victim.
examples: Your account will be suspended today if KYC is not updated.
Last warning: complete KYC immediately.
